data.title: El Salvador’s Bitcoin strategy shifts focus to government holdings as IMF deal limits public adoption
data.description:
26-7-2025 – El Salvador’s Bitcoin experiment has evolved into a government accumulation strategy with minimal impact on ordinary citizens, according to analysis from Bitcoin education advocates, as reported by Cointelegraph. Quentin Ehrenmann, general manager at NGO My First Bitcoin, told Reuters that the country’s IMF loan agreement has effectively ended Bitcoin’s legal tender status and [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/el-salvadors-bitcoin-strategy-shifts-focus-to-government-holdings-as-imf-deal-limits-public-adoption/

data.title: Galaxy digital executes historic $9 billion Bitcoin sale for early crypto whale
data.description:
26-7-2025 – Galaxy Digital has completed the largest bitcoin transaction in history, selling over 80,000 BTC valued at more than $9 billion for an early cryptocurrency investor, according to a company press release. The sale represents what Galaxy described as “one of the earliest and most significant exits from the digital asset market,” executed as [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/galaxy-digital-executes-historic-9-billion-bitcoin-sale-for-early-crypto-whale/

data.title: Altcoins Hold Steady As Bitcoin Faces Heavy Sell Pressure: Here’s Why
data.description:
Bitcoin has been fluctuating, whales are offloading, and exchange inflows are rising; yet altcoins have been on a steadier path, not collapsing. The market-wide dip earlier today, looked uneven. While BTC dropped below $116K, the total altcoin market cap still sits strong above $1. 44 trillion
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/25/altcoins-hold-steady-as-bitcoin-faces-heavy-sell-pressure-heres-why/

data.title: Altcoin Euphoria Meets Cooling Phase – Defensive Rotation Amid Momentum Slowdown
data.description:
Our ETH and SOL overweights paid off early in the week as altcoins led the rally. We began trimming exposure as momentum slowed, rotating into BTC and raising cash. While performance cooled, disciplined risk management preserved outperformance.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/07/26/altcoin-euphoria-meets-cooling-phase-defensive-rotation-amid-momentum-slowdown/

data.title: New Wallet Receives Significant Ethereum Transfer
data.description: According to Foresight News, Onchain Lens monitoring has revealed that a new wallet has received 13,696.8 ETH from Galaxy, valued at approximately $49.97 million. Currently, this wallet holds a total of 100,972 ETH, with an estimated value of around $376 million.

data.title: Robert Kiyosaki slams ETFs for being ‘paper versions’ of Bitcoin, gold and silver
data.description:
Investor and “Rich Dad Poor Dad” author Robert Kiyosaki warned investors to beware of holding Bitcoin (BTC), gold and silver through exchange‑traded funds, saying those paper‑based instruments are no substitute for the real thing.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/robert-kiyosaki-slams-etfs-for-being-paper-versions-of-bitcoin-gold-and-silver/

data.title: REX-Osprey SOL ETF Sees Significant Inflows
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported that the REX-Osprey SOL spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $1.4 million yesterday. Since its launch, the ETF has accumulated a total net inflow of $120.2 million.

data.title: Bitcoin (BTC USD) Price To See More Overbought RSI Conditions: PlanB
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC USD) RSI had reached 75 earlier this week, with PlanB suggesting that this could lead to more months of overbought levels. The analyst based his view on similar market setups in earlier bull runs. Notably, this had occurred as Bitcoin traded near $118,700, with increased trading activity
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/25/bitcoin-btc-usd-price-to-see-more-overbought-rsi-conditions-planb/

data.title: $10,000 To Be Handed To US Bank’s Customers After ‘Extraordinary Losses’ Allegedly Triggered by Data Breach
data.description:
A US bank has agreed to pay up to $10,000 to customers affected by an alleged data breach that exposed personally identifying information. According to a settlement administrator’s portal, The Bank of Canton will pay $300,000 to settle a lawsuit accusing the Canton, Massachusetts-based lender of negligent data security practices.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/25/10000-to-be-handed-to-us-banks-customers-after-extraordinary-losses-allegedly-triggered-by-data-breach/

data.title: Polymarket $10k bet on NASCAR race turns to $60k dispute following Zelensky controversy
data.description:
A routine $10,000 prediction market on Polymarket covering Sunday’s NASCAR Cup Series race erupted into a dispute in UMA’s history after the oracle rejected an early settlement proposal, despite it being accurate.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/polymarket-10k-bet-on-nascar-race-turns-to-60k-dispute-following-zelensky-controversy/

data.title: Under-the-Radar DeFi Lending Altcoin Defies Crypto Market Downtick Amid New Proposal To Increase Staking Rewards
data.description:
A decentralized finance (DeFi) altcoin that received trading support from the crypto exchange Binance in May is seeing gains despite the dip in the digital assets market. The token of Maple Finance (SYRUP) is currently changing hands for $0. 475, up by 7. 95% over the past 24 hours
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/25/under-the-radar-defi-lending-altcoin-defies-crypto-market-downtick-amid-new-proposal-to-increase-staking-rewards/
